name: techtrip-secondbrain
description: One-command bootstrapper for a generic, out-of-the-box LLM Wiki second brain on a fresh Mac. Installs Obsidian, the community plugins, and the claude-obsidian plugin (AgriciDaniel, MIT — pulled from TechTrip's maintained bug-fix fork), scaffolds a clean vault, wires the Obsidian MCP server, ships the yt-fetch and notebooklm-ingest source skills plus the new-idea origination scaffolder, and sets up git sync + backup. Interactive and idempotent.
